# MiOS (Modern immutable Operating System) — Pure FOSS

MiOS is an immutable, AI-native workstation. It is engineered for high-performance virtualization, local AI development, and zero-day transactional stability.

## Core Documentation (Day 0)
- [INDEX.md](./INDEX.md): The Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for laws and API surface.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md): Unified hardware and filesystem blueprints.
- [ENGINEERING.md](./ENGINEERING.md): Security standards and AI integration patterns.

## AI & Agent Integration
- [system-prompt.md](./system-prompt.md): The authoritative persona for MiOS agents.
- [.cursorrules](./.cursorrules): Engineering standards for VS Code Cursor.
- [.clinerules](./.clinerules): Autonomous instructions for Cline/Roo-Code.
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt): Comprehensive flattened context for LLM ingestion.

## Key Technical Specs
- **OS Base**: Immutable bootc-native.
- **Hardware**: Universal silicon support (Primary IDs: `10de:2204,10de:1aef`).
- **AI API**: Local OpenAI-compatible surface at `http://localhost:8080/v1`.

## Repository Structure
- `usr/`: Immutable rootfs templates.
- `etc/`: Persistence templates.
- `tools/`: Utility toolchain.
- `specs/`: Research and blueprints.
- `agents/`: Autonomous agent local environments.
